summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: NumberPlane with BLUE unit circle; ValueTracker theta_tr drives a WHITE radius and YELLOW point. Eight always_redraw segments color-code all six trig functions: RED sin (vertical), GREEN cos (horizontal), ORANGE tan (tangent at x=1), PURPLE sec (radius extended to x=1), TEAL cot (tangent at y=1), PINK csc (radius extended to y=1). Legend + live theta panel on right. Sweep 0.6 -> 1.2 -> 0.35 -> 1.0.
